zh.lifeSummary: 當Alan de Charlton於大約1319年出生在英國史洛普爾時，他的父親Sir Alan Charlton42歲，母親Elena de la Zouche32歲。他於1338年2月10日之後與Margery FitzAer結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1349年5月3日在英國史洛普爾卡斯特萊-普爾維爾巴享年31歲，埋葬在英國史洛普爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alan de Charlton于大约1319年出生在英国史洛普爾时，他的父亲Sir Alan Charlton42岁，母亲Elena de la Zouche32岁。他于1338年2月10日之后与Margery FitzAer结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1349年5月3日在英国史洛普爾卡斯特萊-普爾維爾巴享年31岁，埋葬在英国史洛普爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Charlton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Northumberland and Durham): habitational name from North Charlton or Charlton near Bellingham (both Northumberland) or from any of the many other places so named (there are over ninety examples in England), from Old English Ceorlatūn ‘settlement (Old English tūn) of the peasants’. Old English ceorl denoted originally a free peasant of the lowest rank, later (but probably already before the Norman conquest) a tenant in pure villeinage, a serf or bondsman.

variants.name: Carlton
meanings: English (northern and eastern England): habitational name from any of various places called Carlton (Bedfordshire, Cambridgeshire, Durham, Lincolnshire, Leicestershire, Nottinghamshire, Northamptonshire, Suffolk, East Yorkshire, Yorkshire, and North Yorkshire) or Carleton (Cumberland, Lancashire, Norfolk, Yorkshire). All come from Old Norse karl ‘common man, peasant’ + Old English tūn ‘settlement’ (compare Charlton ). Places spelled Carl(e)ton (as opposed to Charlton) are in areas of Scandinavian settlement, mostly in northern England.

variants.name: Carlin
meanings: Irish (North Ulster; now also common in Scotland): from Ó Cearbhalláin ‘descendant of Cearbhallán’, a diminutive of the personal name Cearbhall (see Carroll ).
Italian (Veneto): from a pet form of the personal name Carlo, Italian form of Charles .

nameMeanings.name: Alan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Celtic origin and uncertain derivation (possibly a diminutive of a word meaning ‘rock’). It was introduced into England by Breton followers of William the Conqueror , most notably Alan , Earl of Brittany, who was rewarded for his services with vast estates in the newly conquered kingdom. In Britain the variants Allan and Allen are considerably less frequent, and generally represent transferred uses of surname forms, whereas in America all three forms of the name are approximately equally common. See also Alun .

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Alan de Charlton was born about 1319, in Shropshire, England, his father, Sir Alan Charlton, was 42 and his mother, Elena de la Zouche, was 32. He married Margery FitzAer after 10 February 1338. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died on 3 May 1349, in Castle-Pulverbatch, Shropshire, England, at the age of 31, and was buried in Shropshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alan de Charlton est né environ 1319, à Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Alan Charlton, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Elena de la Zouche, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Margery FitzAer après 10 février 1338. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé le 3 mai 1349, à Castle-Pulverbatch, Shropshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 31 ans, et a été enterré à Shropshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alan de Charlton um 1319 in Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Alan Charlton 42 und seine Mutter Elena de la Zouche 32. Er hat nach 10. Februar 1338 Margery FitzAer geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb am 3. Mai 1349 im Alter von 31 Jahren in Castle-Pulverbatch, Shropshire, England und wurde in Shropshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alan de Charlton è nato il circa 1319 nel Shropshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Alan Charlton, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Elena de la Zouche, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Margery FitzAer dopo il 10 febbraio 1338. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì il 3 maggio 1349, nel Castle-Pulverbatch, Shropshire, England, all'età di 31 anni, e fu sepolto a Shropshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Alan de Charltonが約1319年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Alan Charltonは42歳，母Elena de la Zoucheは32歳であった。1338年2月10日以後にMargery FitzAerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1349年5月3日にイギリスシュロプシュアイアカストレ-プウルバーバトチで31歳で死去し，イギリスシュロプシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alan de Charlton(이)가 대략 1319년 영국 슈럽실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Alan Charlton(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Elena de la Zouche(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1338년 2월 10일 이후 Margery FitzAer(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1349년 5월 3일 영국 슈럽실르 카스틀레-풀버바트치에서 31세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 슈럽실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alan de Charlton nasceu aproximadamente 1319, em Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Alan Charlton, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Elena de la Zouche, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Margery FitzAer após 10 de fevereiro de 1338. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 3 de maio de 1349, em Castle-Pulverbatch, Shropshire, Inglaterra, com 31 anos, e foi sepultado em Shropshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alan de Charlton родился около 1319 г. в местности шропшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Alan Charlton было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Elena de la Zouche, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Margery FitzAer после 10 февраль 1338 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер 3 мая 1349 г. в местности кастле-пулвирбач, шропшир, Англия в возрасте 31 год и был похоронен в местности шропшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alan de Charlton nació aproximadamente 1319, en Shropshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Alan Charlton, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Elena de la Zouche, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Margery FitzAer después de 10 de febrero de 1338. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió el 3 de mayo de 1349, en Castle-Pulverbatch, Shropshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 31 años, y fue sepultado en Shropshire, Inglaterra.
